name: The Pool Rules
description:
Scenario

You are the owner of the Panagram Indoor Pool Resort, a building home to many different pools and jacuzzis. Many pools are within large windowless rooms and seperated by gender, with male-only pools, female-only pools, and unisex-pools.

To make sure pool-goers follow the rules, each pool, jacuzzi, and changing room has a whiteboard within eye-sight so everyone can see the rules, which, are as follows:

1. Have fun! :)

2. No running, diving, animals, glass, and swimming while drunk.

3. Wear appropriate swimwear.

4. Don't push others into the pool.

5. Don't jump into the pool.

6. Avoid openings that create suction such as drains.

7. Do not erase the rules on the whiteboard.

However, unknown to anyone else, you have three markers. There's the green marker, which is just a normal marker, but the other two, your blue & red markers, are magical. Any rules written down with these markers will make pool-goers follow them as if they're common sense, even if the rule(s) are humilating, sexual, or immoral in nature.

Any rules written down on the whiteboards using the red marker will be followed by all pool-goers within the room the whiteboard is present in. Any rules written down on the whiteboards using the blue marker will be followed by all pool-goers within the resort. When a pool-goer exits a pool room affected by a rule written with the red marker, or the resort itself, the pool-goer will forget anything strange that might've happened.

For example, since Rule 7, the 'do not erase the rules on the whiteboard' rule, is written with the blue marker, no one can will be physically capable of erasing the rules on any of the whiteboards no matter what. However, the rest of the rules are written with a green marker.

How will you use these markers? Will you fulfil your sexual urges? Will you create an utopia? Or will you be a responsible Pool owner?

Other Notes

There's not a lot to say about this one, this was another premise that came to me in my imagination years ago. Although, I ended up forgetting about it until now. I made it so that you could make rules either magically affect the entire resort, or just a specific pool room; as I felt if without both options, it'd feel weirdly limited.

Also, this is going to be my last chatbot I make on Janitor.

I basically started working on chatbots to fill in a void for chatbots I wanted to exist like a few hypnosis Touhou bots, Nicchi Sangyou's stuff, premises from my favourite mind control scenarios, a time stop bot to my liking, etc.. However, apart from one chatbot I can only release on a website that rhymes with rub due to the sheer token size, I've done everything I wanted to do with making chatbots realistically. The only thing left would be making Touhou hypnosis bots, but the sheer scale of that is way too much (and even than, with lorebooks there's no need imo).

If Janitor allows users to make lorebooks and use them without paying for a subscription, I'll make some lorebooks, but in terms of chatbots, there's not much else I feel I have to do. I'll also still be using Janitor, so if any of my chatbot images get censored or need to change things for my chatbots based on feedback, I'll do what I can.

Artwork by FluffyDus: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/84098467

Manip by misterman4: https://hypnohub.net/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=145395
